title: notholaena candida var. copelandii
intro: Notholaena candida var. copelandii, also known as Copeland's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Notholaena candida var. copelandii include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in teas and tinctures.
